mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_LOGIN_LOG ( INPUT_USER_ID, USER_ID, ONLINE_YN, LOGIN_SUCCESS_YN, LOGIN_IP, FAIL_RSN ) VALUES ( #{inputUserId}, #{userId}, #{onlineYn}, #{loginSuccessYn}, #{loginIp}, #{failRsn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_LOGIN_LOG SET LOGOUT_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP, ONLINE_YN = 'N', MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ONLINE_YN = 'Y' AND LOGOUT_DT IS NULL
UPDATE MEMBER_LOGIN_LOG SET LOGOUT_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP, ONLINE_YN = 'N', MOD_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ONLINE_YN = 'Y' AND LOGOUT_DT IS NULL
